## The Problem

<!-- Describe the situation or pain point this idea addresses.

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Your idea for addressing the problem. Be concrete — include pseudocode,

## Open Questions

<!-- Unresolved trade-offs or things you're uncertain about.

## Scope Estimate

- [ ] S — prototype fits in a single PR (< 200 LOC)
- [ ] M — small feature (1-3 PRs)
- [ ] L — significant effort; needs a plan phase
